Job poster

Message

About the job

Anthropic Integration Engineer

Join Australia's first AI Talent Marketplace

Ongoing client assignments through Galileo Search

Sydney / Contract / Hybrid

The way companies work is about to fundamentally change. Anthropic's Claude and Cowork are replacing legacy workflows across enterprises right now — and the companies making the move need engineers who can build the integrations that make it happen.

Galileo Search is building Australia's first specialist marketplace of certified Anthropic integration professionals. We're not a recruitment agency. We're a curated workforce of verified AI specialists who deliver enterprise Claude deployments end-to-end. Think Big 4 consulting but focused entirely on the Anthropic ecosystem.

We're looking for engineers who want to be at the centre of this shift — building Claude API integrations, MCP servers, Cowork skills, and AI-first workflows for enterprise clients across financial services, government, healthcare, and professional services.

What you'll do on client engagements

  • Build production Claude API integrations connecting enterprise systems to AI-powered workflows
  • Design and deploy MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers that give Claude secure access to internal tools and data
  • Create custom Cowork skills and plugins tailored to each client's departments and processes
  • Migrate legacy automation (RPA, scripted workflows, manual processes) to Claude-powered alternatives
  • Work alongside Solutions Architects, Change Managers, and Project Managers as part of a Galileo delivery team

What you bring, preferred experience

  • 3+ years software development experience in Python, TypeScript, or both
  • Strong API integration skills — you've connected systems, built middleware, or worked with REST/GraphQL APIs
  • Comfort working in enterprise environments with security requirements, stakeholder management, and documentation expectations
  • Genuine interest in AI and LLMs — you don't need to be an expert yet, but you need to be curious and fast-learning

Nice to have (not required)

  • Prior experience with Claude API, OpenAI API, or other LLM platforms
  • Familiarity with MCP, Cowork, or Claude Code
  • Experience with enterprise platforms (SAP, Salesforce, ServiceNow) as integration targets
  • Cloud infrastructure experience (AWS, Azure, GCP)

What Galileo offers

  • Great contract rates depending on experience
  • Steady pipeline of enterprise clients — we handle sales, scoping, and contracts so you focus on delivery
  • Free Anthropic certification training — we'll get you certified if you aren't already

You don't need to be an Anthropic expert today. If you're a strong engineer who's excited about what AI is doing to enterprise software and you want to specialise in the ecosystem that's winning — we'll invest in getting you there. We provide the training, the certification pathway, and the client pipeline. You bring the engineering skills and the drive.

Requirements added by the job poster

• No need for visa sponsorship

• Authorized to work in Australia

About the company

Galileo Search

34,865 followers

IT Services and IT Consulting

•

11-50 employees

•

11 on LinkedIn

Galileo Search | Australia's Anthropic Integration Partner We help businesses adopt Claude AI across their entire workforce, from board-level business cases to employee-level Cowork automations, backed by specialist talent who deliver the integration. Why Anthropic. Why Now. Claude is the most capable AI for enterprise work. Cowork turns it into a personal automation engine for every employee. Claude Code gives engineering teams an AI pair programmer. But most organisations don't know where to start, how to prepare their data, or how to scale beyond a pilot. We build the business case, set up the automations, prepare the data, manage the risk, and supply the people who make it stick. What We Do: * Cowork Integration: Our AI assistant (text or voice) takes every employee from zero to working automations in a single session. Leaders get adoption dashboards and IT resolution tracking. * Business Case Generator: Board-ready AI automation business cases in 30 minutes. Maps opportunities in the Anthropic ecosystem with ROI projections & risk frameworks. * Claude Code & Developer Integration: Specialist talent to deliver agentic workflows, MCP integrations, and production software deployments. *Salary Intelligence: Benchmark AI talent costs across 74 roles, built into your business case:6 Australian cities. AI Talent for Integration: Every integration needs people. We supply: — AI Engineers & Solutions Architects — AI Governance, Security & Risk Specialists — Data Engineers & Analytics Leads — Business Analysts & Project Managers — Cowork Integration Specialists — AI Product Owners & Program Directors Expert technology recruitment since 2009. Permanent, contract, or managed services. We work with businesses ready to move, from growth-stage companies adopting AI for the first time to established organisations scaling Claude across departments. AI compliance & data governance built into every engagement. Partnering with Anthropic using certified specialists.

Interested in working with us in the future?

Privately share your profile with our recruiters – you’ll be noted as expressing interest for up to a year and be notified about jobs and updates. Learn more
